title: nephrodium filix-mas subsp. paleaceum
intro: Nephrodium filix-mas subsp. paleaceum is a subspecies of the fern plant, specifically a type of lycopodium or club moss. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nephrodium filix-mas subsp. paleaceum include potential uses in the treatment of various conditions such as arthritis, skin irritations, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is prepared by drying and then using it in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and salves.
